Uses of Interface
org.moeaframework.core.Initialization

Packages that use Initialization
Package
Description
org.moeaframework.algorithm
Implementations of various algorithms and support tools for working with algorithms.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.sa
Implementations of various simulated annealing (SA) algorithms.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.single
Implementations of various single-objective optimization algorithms.
org.moeaframework.core.initialization
Package of various initialization operators.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    AbstractEvolutionaryAlgorithm(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, Population population, NondominatedPopulation archive, Initialization initialization, Variation variation)
    Constructs an abstract evolutionary algorithm.
     
    AGEMOEAII(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, org.moeaframework.algorithm.AGEMOEAII.AGEMOEAIIPopulation population, Selection selection, Variation variation, Initialization initialization)
    Constructs the AGE-MOEA-II algorithm with the specified components.
     
    EpsilonMOEA(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, Population population, EpsilonBoxDominanceArchive archive, Selection selection, Variation variation, Initialization initialization)
    Constructs the ε-MOEA algorithm with the specified components.
     
    EpsilonMOEA(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, Population population, EpsilonBoxDominanceArchive archive, Selection selection, Variation variation, Initialization initialization, DominanceComparator dominanceComparator)
    Constructs the ε-MOEA algorithm with the specified components.
     
    EpsilonNSGAII(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, NondominatedSortingPopulation population, EpsilonBoxDominanceArchive archive, Selection selection, Variation variation, Initialization initialization, int windowSize, int maxWindowSize, double injectionRate, int minimumPopulationSize, int maximumPopulationSize)
    Constructs the ε-NSGA-II instance with the specified components.
     
    GDE3(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, NondominatedSortingPopulation population, DominanceComparator comparator, DifferentialEvolutionSelection selection, DifferentialEvolutionVariation variation, Initialization initialization)
    Constructs the GDE3 algorithm with the specified components.
     
    GDE3(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, NondominatedSortingPopulation population, DifferentialEvolutionSelection selection, DifferentialEvolutionVariation variation, Initialization initialization)
    Constructs the GDE3 algorithm with the specified components.
     
    IBEA(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, NondominatedPopulation archive, Initialization initialization, Variation variation, IndicatorFitnessEvaluator fitnessEvaluator)
    Constructs a new IBEA instance.
     
    MOEAD(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, int neighborhoodSize, Initialization initialization, Variation variation, double delta, double eta)
    Constructs the MOEA/D algorithm with the specified components.
     
    MOEAD(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, int neighborhoodSize, Initialization initialization, Variation variation, double delta, double eta, int updateUtility)
    Constructs the MOEA/D algorithm with the specified components.
     
    MOEAD(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, int neighborhoodSize, WeightGenerator weightGenerator, Initialization initialization, Variation variation, double delta, double eta)
    Constructs the MOEA/D algorithm with the specified components.
     
    MOEAD(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, int neighborhoodSize, WeightGenerator weightGenerator, Initialization initialization, Variation variation, double delta, double eta, int updateUtility)
    Constructs the MOEA/D algorithm with the specified components.
     
    MSOPS(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, MSOPSRankedPopulation population, DifferentialEvolutionSelection selection, DifferentialEvolutionVariation variation, Initialization initialization)
    Constructs a new instance of the MSOPS algorithm.
     
    NSGAII(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, NondominatedSortingPopulation population, EpsilonBoxDominanceArchive archive, Selection selection, Variation variation, Initialization initialization)
    Constructs the NSGA-II algorithm with the specified components.
     
    NSGAIII(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, ReferencePointNondominatedSortingPopulation population, Selection selection, Variation variation, Initialization initialization)
    Constructs a new NSGA-III instance with the specified components.
     
    PESA2(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, Variation variation, Initialization initialization, int bisections, int archiveSize)
    Constructs a new PESA2 instance.
     
    RandomSearch(Problem problem, int sampleSize, Initialization generator, NondominatedPopulation archive)
    Constructs a new random search procedure for the given problem.
     
    RVEA(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, ReferenceVectorGuidedPopulation population, Variation variation, Initialization initialization, int maxGeneration, int adaptFrequency)
    Constructs a new instance of the RVEA algorithm.
     
    SMSEMOA(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, Initialization initialization, Variation variation, FitnessEvaluator fitnessEvaluator)
    Constructs a new SMS-EMOA instance.
     
    SPEA2(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, Initialization initialization, Variation variation, int numberOfOffspring, int k)
    Constructs a new instance of SPEA2.
     
    UNSGAIII(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, ReferencePointNondominatedSortingPopulation population, Selection selection, Variation variation, Initialization initialization)
    Constructs a new U-NSGA-III instance with the specified components.
     
    VEGA(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, Population population, NondominatedPopulation archive, Initialization initialization, Variation variation)
    Constructs a new VEGA instance.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    DifferentialEvolution(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, AggregateObjectiveComparator comparator, Initialization initialization, DifferentialEvolutionSelection selection, DifferentialEvolutionVariation variation)
    Constructs a new instance of the single-objective differential evolution (DE) algorithm.
     
    EvolutionStrategy(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, AggregateObjectiveComparator comparator, Initialization initialization, SelfAdaptiveNormalVariation variation)
    Constructs a new instance of the evolution strategy (ES) algorithm.
     
    GeneticAlgorithm(Problem problem, int initialPopulationSize, AggregateObjectiveComparator comparator, Initialization initialization, Variation variation)
    Constructs a new instance of the genetic algorithm (GA).

    Creates a new instance of the Simulated Annealing (SA) algorithm.

    Constructs a new single-objective algorithm.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    InjectedInitialization
    Initialization method that injects pre-defined solutions into the initial population.
    class 
    RandomInitialization
    Initializes all built-in decision variables randomly.
